title: Hormozi - Business Owners Stay Poor (Blame)
transcript: Business owners stay poor because they're afraid of other poor business owners judging them for doing the things that it takes to win. And so if you want to feel better, blame other people. If you want to get better, blame yourself. If you're tired of the things that have prevented you, maybe it's the president or your market or your competition or inflation or interest rates or whatever else you can think of for why the business isn't growing the way you want it to. We put together a scaling roadmap from studying every business that we own that's been exposed to the same pressures and we figured out where they got stuck and how we broke through. We broke it into 10 phases across eight different functions of the business, and I want to gift it to you. It's absolutely free. And on the next page, if you are a business owner and you'd like our help applying this stuff to your business, then just book a call. We scale businesses and we'd love to help you scale.

hook.text: Business owners stay poor because they're afraid of other poor business owners judging them.

sections.name: Hook - Mirror
sections.summary: Te quedás pobre por miedo al juicio de otros pobres

sections.name: Agitate - Blame
sections.summary: Si querés sentirte mejor, culpá a otros. Si querés mejorar, culpate a vos.

sections.name: Solution + CTA
sections.summary: Roadmap de empresas expuestas a las mismas presiones

structure.rehook_text: If you're tired of the things that have prevented you

key_phrases: afraid of other poor business owners judging them
blame other people vs blame yourself
I want to gift it to you

cta.text: I want to gift it to you. It's absolutely free.

analysis.emotional_arc: Provocación (te quedás pobre por miedo) → confrontación (blame yourself) → neutralización de excusas → regalo
strengths: Hook que provoca ego y obliga a seguir viendo
Dicotomía feel better vs get better es brillante
Lista de excusas (presidente, mercado, inflación) valida y destruye a la vez
patterns_to_replicate: Patrón ESPEJO: mostrarle al viewer exactamente lo que está haciendo mal de forma que no pueda mirar para otro lado
Dicotomía simple: feel better vs get better como test de identidad
Listar excusas comunes y luego demolerlas con evidencia propia
